sourceName: HUD Fair Market Rents 2026 - Bay Area FMR Area Metrics
jurisdiction: San Francisco Bay Area HUD FMR/MSA areas
notes: Official HUD Open Data ArcGIS layer for Fair Market Rents. This config imports area-level 0-4 bedroom FMR values for Bay Area-related HUD FMR/MSA areas. It does not request geometry, addresses, people, households, owners, contacts, parcel records, property names, or resident records.
